items.title: A Case for Fine-grain Coherence Specialization in Heterogeneous Systems.
items.abstract: Hardware specialization is becoming a key enabler of energy-efficient performance. Future systems will be increasingly heterogeneous, integrating multiple specialized and programmable accelerators, each with different memory demands. Traditionally, communication between accelerators has been inefficient, typically orchestrated through explicit DMA transfers between different address spaces. More recently, industry has proposed unified coherent memory which enables implicit data movement and more data reuse, but often these interfaces limit the coherence flexibility available to heterogeneous systems. This paper demonstrates the benefits of fine-grained coherence specialization for heterogeneous systems. We propose an architecture that enables low-complexity independent specialization of each individual coherence request in heterogeneous workloads by building upon a simple and flexible baseline coherence interface, Spandex. We then describe how to optimize individual memory requests to improve cache reuse and performance-critical memory latency in emerging heterogeneous workloads. Collectively, our techniques enable significant gains, reducing execution time by up to 61% or network traffic by up to 99% while adding minimal complexity to the Spandex protocol.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件专业化正在成为节能性能的关键推动因素。未来的系统将越来越异构，集成多个专用和可编程加速器，每个加速器都有不同的内存需求。传统上，加速器之间的通信效率低下，通常通过不同地址空间之间的显式 DMA 传输来协调。最近，业界提出了统一相干存储器，它可以实现隐式数据移动和更多数据重用，但这些接口通常限制异构系统可用的相干灵活性。本文展示了异构系统的细粒度一致性专业化的好处。我们提出了一种架构，通过构建简单而灵活的基线一致性接口 Spandex，能够对异构工作负载中的每个单独的一致性请求进行低复杂性的独立专业化。然后，我们描述如何优化单个内存请求，以改善新兴异构工作负载中的缓存重用和性能关键型内存延迟。总的来说，我们的技术可以带来显着的收益，将执行时间减少多达 61%，或将网络流量减少多达 99%，同时将 Spandex 协议的复杂性降至最低。

items.title: Task-RM: A Resource Manager for Energy Reduction in Task-Parallel Applications under Quality of Service Constraints.
items.abstract: Improving energy efficiency is an important goal of computer system design. This article focuses on a general model of task-parallel applications under quality-of-service requirements on the completion time. Our technique, called Task-RM , exploits the variance in task execution-times and imbalance between tasks to allocate just enough resources in terms of voltage-frequency and core-allocation so that the application completes before the deadline. Moreover, we provide a solution that can harness additional energy savings with the availability of additional processors. We observe that, for the proposed run-time resource manager to allocate resources, it requires specification of the soft deadlines to the tasks. This is accomplished by analyzing the energy-saving scenarios offline and by providing Task-RM with the performance requirements of the tasks. The evaluation shows an energy saving of 33% compared to race-to-idle and 22% compared to dynamic slack allocation (DSA) with an overhead of less than 1%.
items.abstract_zh: 提高能源效率是计算机系统设计的一个重要目标。本文重点讨论服务质量要求下完成时间的任务并行应用程序的通用模型。我们的技术称为 Task-RM，利用任务执行时间的差异和任务之间的不平衡来分配足够的资源（在电压频率和核心分配方面），以便应用程序在截止日期之前完成。此外，我们提供的解决方案可以通过使用额外的处理器来进一步节省能源。我们观察到，对于建议的运行时资源管理器来分配资源，它需要指定任务的软截止日期。这是通过离线分析节能场景并向 Task-RM 提供任务的性能要求来完成的。评估显示，与竞态空闲分配相比，节能 33%，与动态松弛分配 (DSA) 相比，节能 22%，且开销不到 1%。

items.title: Compiler Support for Sparse Tensor Computations in MLIR.
items.abstract: Sparse tensors arise in problems in science, engineering, machine learning, and data analytics. Programs that operate on such tensors can exploit sparsity to reduce storage requirements and computational time. Developing and maintaining sparse software by hand, however, is a complex and error-prone task. Therefore, we propose treating sparsity as a property of tensors, not a tedious implementation task, and letting a sparse compiler generate sparse code automatically from a sparsity-agnostic definition of the computation. This article discusses integrating this idea into MLIR.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量出现在科学、工程、机器学习和数据分析的问题中。在此类张量上运行的程序可以利用稀疏性来减少存储需求和计算时间。然而，手动开发和维护稀疏软件是一项复杂且容易出错的任务。因此，我们建议将稀疏性视为张量的属性，而不是一项繁琐的实现任务，并让稀疏编译器根据与稀疏性无关的计算定义自动生成稀疏代码。本文讨论将这一想法集成到 MLIR 中。

items.title: Marvel: A Data-Centric Approach for Mapping Deep Learning Operators on Spatial Accelerators.
items.abstract: A spatial accelerator’s efficiency depends heavily on both its mapper and cost models to generate optimized mappings for various operators of DNN models. However, existing cost models lack a formal boundary over their input programs (operators) for accurate and tractable cost analysis of the mappings, and this results in adaptability challenges to the cost models for new operators. We consider the recently introduced Maestro Data-Centric (MDC) notation and its analytical cost model to address this challenge because any mapping expressed in the notation is precisely analyzable using the MDC’s cost model. In this article, we characterize the set of input operators and their mappings expressed in the MDC notation by introducing a set of conformability rules . The outcome of these rules is that any loop nest that is perfectly nested with affine tensor subscripts and without conditionals is conformable to the MDC notation. A majority of the primitive operators in deep learning are such loop nests. In addition, our rules enable us to automatically translate a mapping expressed in the loop nest form to MDC notation and use the MDC’s cost model to guide upstream mappers. Our conformability rules over the input operators result in a structured mapping space of the operators, which enables us to introduce a mapper based on our decoupled off-chip/on-chip approach to accelerate mapping space exploration. Our mapper decomposes the original higher-dimensional mapping space of operators into two lower-dimensional off-chip and on-chip subspaces and then optimizes the off-chip subspace followed by the on-chip subspace. We implemented our overall approach in a tool called Marvel , and a benefit of our approach is that it applies to any operator conformable with the MDC notation. We evaluated Marvel over major DNN operators and compared it with past optimizers.
items.abstract_zh: 空间加速器的效率在很大程度上取决于其映射器和成本模型，以便为 DNN 模型的各种算子生成优化的映射。然而，现有的成本模型缺乏对其输入程序（运算符）的正式边界，无法对映射进行准确且易于处理的成本分析，这导致新运算符的成本模型面临适应性挑战。我们考虑最近引入的 Maestro Data-Centric (MDC) 表示法及其分析成本模型来解决这一挑战，因为该表示法中表达的任何映射都可以使用 MDC 的成本模型进行精确分析。在本文中，我们通过引入一组一致性规则来表征输入运算符集及其以 MDC 表示法表示的映射。这些规则的结果是任何与仿射张量下标完美嵌套并且没有条件的循环嵌套都符合 MDC 表示法。深度学习中的大多数原始运算符都是这样的循环嵌套。此外，我们的规则使我们能够自动将以循环嵌套形式表示的映射转换为 MDC 表示法，并使用 MDC 的成本模型来指导上游映射器。我们对输入运算符的一致性规则产生了运算符的结构化映射空间，这使我们能够引入基于解耦片外/片上方法的映射器来加速映射空间探索。我们的映射器将算子的原始高维映射空间分解为两个低维片外和片内子空间，然后优化片外子空间，然后优化片内子空间。我们在一个名为 Marvel 的工具中实现了我们的整体方法，我们方法的一个好处是它适用于任何符合 MDC 表示法的运算符。我们对主要 DNN 算子进行了评估，并将其与过去的优化器进行了比较。

items.title: ERASE: Energy Efficient Task Mapping and Resource Management for Work Stealing Runtimes.
items.abstract: Parallel applications often rely on work stealing schedulers in combination with fine-grained tasking to achieve high performance and scalability. However, reducing the total energy consumption in the context of work stealing runtimes is still challenging, particularly when using asymmetric architectures with different types of CPU cores. A common approach for energy savings involves dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) wherein throttling is carried out based on factors like task parallelism, stealing relations, and task criticality. This article makes the following observations: (i) leveraging DVFS on a per-task basis is impractical when using fine-grained tasking and in environments with cluster/chip-level DVFS; (ii) task moldability, wherein a single task can execute on multiple threads/cores via work-sharing, can help to reduce energy consumption; and (iii) mismatch between tasks and assigned resources (i.e., core type and number of cores) can detrimentally impact energy consumption. In this article, we propose EneRgy Aware SchedulEr (ERASE), an intra-application task scheduler on top of work stealing runtimes that aims to reduce the total energy consumption of parallel applications. It achieves energy savings by guiding scheduling decisions based on per-task energy consumption predictions of different resource configurations. In addition, ERASE is capable of adapting to both given static frequency settings and externally controlled DVFS. Overall, ERASE achieves up to 31% energy savings and improves performance by 44% on average, compared to the state-of-the-art DVFS-based schedulers.
items.abstract_zh: 并行应用程序通常依赖工作窃取调度程序与细粒度任务分配相结合来实现高性能和可扩展性。然而，在工作窃取运行时降低总能耗仍然具有挑战性，特别是在使用具有不同类型 CPU 内核的非对称架构时。一种常见的节能方法涉及动态电压和频率调节 (DVFS)，其中根据任务​​并行性、窃取关系和任务关键性等因素进行节流。本文提出以下观点：(i) 在使用细粒度任务分配以及具有集群/芯片级 DVFS 的环境中时，在每个任务的基础上利用 DVFS 是不切实际的； (ii) 任务可塑性，其中单个任务可以通过工作共享在多个线程/核心上执行，有助于减少能耗； (iii) 任务和分配的资源（即核心类型和核心数量）之间的不匹配可能会对能耗产生不利影响。在本文中，我们提出了 EneRgy Aware SchedulEr (ERASE)，这是一种基于工作窃取运行时的应用程序内任务调度程序，旨在减少并行应用程序的总能耗。它通过根据不同资源配置的每任务能耗预测指导调度决策来实现节能。此外，ERASE 能够适应给定的静态频率设置和外部控制的 DVFS。总体而言，与最先进的基于 DVFS 的调度程序相比，ERASE 实现了高达 31% 的节能，性能平均提高了 44%。

items.title: An FPGA Overlay for CNN Inference with Fine-grained Flexible Parallelism.
items.abstract: Increasingly, pre-trained convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are being deployed for inference in various computer vision applications, both on the server-side in the data centers and at the edge. CNN inference is a very compute-intensive task. It is a challenge to meet performance metrics such as latency and throughput while optimizing power. Special-purpose ASICs and FPGAs are suitable candidates to meet these power and performance budgets simultaneously. Rapidly evolving CNN architectures involve novel convolution operations such as point convolutions, depth separable convolutions, and so on. This leads to substantial variation in the computational structure across CNNs and layers within a CNN. Because of this, FPGA reconfigurability provides an attractive tradeoff compared to ASICs. FPGA-based hardware designers address the structural variability issue by generating a network-specific accelerator for a single network or a class of networks. However, homogeneous accelerators are network agnostic and often sacrifice throughput and FPGA LUTs for flexibility. In this article, we propose an FPGA overlay for efficient processing of CNNs that can be scaled based on the available compute and memory resources of the FPGA. The overlay is configured on the fly through control words sent by the host on a per-layer basis. Unlike current overlays, our architecture exploits all forms of parallelism inside a convolution operation. A constraint system is employed at the host end to find out the per-layer configuration of the overlay that uses all forms of parallelism in the processing of the layer, resulting in the highest throughput for that layer. We studied the effectiveness of our overlay by using it to process AlexNet, VGG16, YOLO, MobileNet, and ResNet-50 CNNs targeting a Virtex7 and a bigger Ultrascale+VU9P FPGAs. The chosen CNNs have a mix of different types of convolution layers and filter sizes, presenting a good variation in model size and structure. Our accelerator reported a maximum throughput of 1,200 GOps/second on the Virtex7, an improvement of 1.2 \( \times \) to 5 \( \times \) over the recent designs. Also, the reported performance density, measured in giga operations per second per KLUT, is 1.3 \( \times \) to 4 \( \times \) improvement over existing works. Similar speed-up and performance density is also observed for the Ultrascale+VU9P FPGA.
items.abstract_zh: 预训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 越来越多地被部署用于各种计算机视觉应用中的推理，无论是在数据中心的服务器端还是在边缘。 CNN 推理是一项计算量非常大的任务。在优化功耗的同时满足延迟和吞吐量等性能指标是一项挑战。专用 ASIC 和 FPGA 是同时满足这些功耗和性能预算的合适选择。 Rapidly evolving CNN architectures involve novel convolution operations such as point convolutions, depth separable convolutions, and so on.这导致 CNN 和 CNN 内各层的计算结构发生巨大变化。因此，与 ASIC 相比，FPGA 的可重配置性提供了有吸引力的权衡。基于 FPGA 的硬件设计人员通过为单个网络或一类网络生成特定于网络的加速器来解决结构可变性问题。然而，同构加速器与网络无关，并且通常会为了灵活性而牺牲吞吐量和 FPGA LUT。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高效处理 CNN 的 FPGA 覆盖层，该覆盖层可以根据 FPGA 的可用计算和内存资源进行扩展。覆盖层是通过主机按层发送的控制字动态配置的。与当前的覆盖不同，我们的架构利用了卷积运算内所有形式的并行性。主机端采用约束系统来找出覆盖层的每层配置，该配置在该层的处理中使用所有形式的并行性，从而导致该层的最高吞吐量。我们通过使用覆盖来处理针对 Virtex7 和更大的 Ultrascale+VU9P FPGA 的 AlexNet、VGG16、YOLO、MobileNet 和 ResNet-50 CNN，研究了覆盖的有效性。所选的 CNN 混合了不同类型的卷积层和滤波器大小，在模型大小和结构上呈现出良好的变化。我们的加速器在 Virtex7 上报告的最大吞吐量为 1,200 GOps/秒，比最近的设计提高了 1.2 \( \times \) 到 5 \( \times \)。此外，报告的性能密度（以每个 KLUT 每秒千兆次操作来衡量）比现有作品提高了 1.3 \(\times\) 到 4\(\times\)。 Ultrascale+VU9P FPGA 也观察到类似的加速和性能密度。

items.title: Triangle Dropping: An Occluded-geometry Predictor for Energy-efficient Mobile GPUs.
items.abstract: This article proposes a novel micro-architecture approach for mobile GPUs aimed at early removing the occluded geometry in a scene by leveraging frame-to-frame coherence, thus reducing the overall energy consumption. Mobile GPUs commonly implement a Tile-Based Rendering (TBR) architecture that differentiates two main phases: the Geometry Pipeline , where all the geometry of a scene is processed; and the Raster Pipeline , where primitives are rendered in a framebuffer. After the Geometry Pipeline, only non-culled primitives inside the camera’s frustum are stored into the Parameter Buffer , a data structure stored in DRAM. However, among the non-culled primitives there is a significant amount that are rendered but non-visible at all , resulting in useless computations. On average, 60% of those primitives are completely occluded in our benchmarks. Despite TBR architectures use on-chip caches for the Parameter Buffer, about 46% of the DRAM traffic still comes from accesses to such buffer. The proposed Triangle Dropping technique leverages the visibility information computed along the Raster Pipeline to predict the primitives’ visibility in the next frame to early discard those that will be totally occluded, drastically reducing Parameter Buffer accesses. On average, our approach achieves overall 14.5% energy savings, 28.2% energy-delay product savings, and a speedup of 20.2%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于移动 GPU 的新颖微架构方法，旨在通过利用帧到帧的一致性来尽早消除场景中被遮挡的几何图形，从而降低总体能耗。移动 GPU 通常实现基于图块的渲染 (TBR) 架构，该架构区分两个主要阶段： 几何管道 ，其中处理场景的所有几何图形；以及光栅管道，其中基元在帧缓冲区中渲染。在几何管道之后，只有相机视锥体内未剔除的图元才会存储到参数缓冲区（参数缓冲区）中，参数缓冲区是存储在 DRAM 中的数据结构。然而，在未剔除的图元中，有大量已渲染但根本不可见，从而导致无用的计算。平均而言，60% 的基元在我们的基准测试中被完全遮挡。尽管 TBR 架构使用片上缓存作为参数缓冲区，但大约 46% 的 DRAM 流量仍然来自对此类缓冲区的访问。所提出的三角形丢弃技术利用沿光栅管道计算的可见性信息来预测下一帧中图元的可见性，以尽早丢弃那些将完全被遮挡的图元，从而大大减少参数缓冲区访问。平均而言，我们的方法总体节能 14.5%，节能产品节能 28.2%，加速 20.2%。

items.title: LiteCON: An All-photonic Neuromorphic Accelerator for Energy-efficient Deep Learning.
items.abstract: Deep learning is highly pervasive in today's data-intensive era. In particular, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are being widely adopted in a variety of fields for superior accuracy. However, computing deep CNNs on traditional CPUs and GPUs brings several performance and energy pitfalls. Several novel approaches based on ASIC, FPGA, and resistive-memory devices have been recently demonstrated with promising results. Most of them target only the inference (testing) phase of deep learning. There have been very limited attempts to design a full-fledged deep learning accelerator capable of both training and inference. It is due to the highly compute- and memory-intensive nature of the training phase. In this article, we propose LiteCON , a novel analog photonics CNN accelerator. LiteCON uses silicon microdisk-based convolution, memristor-based memory, and dense-wavelength-division-multiplexing for energy-efficient and ultrafast deep learning. We evaluate LiteCON using a commercial CAD framework (IPKISS) on deep learning benchmark models including LeNet and VGG-Net. Compared to the state of the art, LiteCON improves the CNN throughput, energy efficiency, and computational efficiency by up to 32×, 37×, and 5×, respectively, with trivial accuracy degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习在当今的数据密集型时代非常普遍。特别是，卷积神经网络（CNN）因其卓越的准确性而被广泛应用于各个领域。然而，在传统 CPU 和 GPU 上计算深度 CNN 会带来一些性能和能耗缺陷。最近已经展示了几种基于 ASIC、FPGA 和电阻存储器件的新颖方法，并取得了可喜的结果。其中大多数仅针对深度学习的推理（测试）阶段。设计能够进行训练和推理的成熟深度学习加速器的尝试非常有限。这是由于训练阶段的计算和内存高度密集的性质。在本文中，我们提出了 LiteCON，一种新型模拟光子 CNN 加速器。 LiteCON 使用基于硅微盘的卷积、基于忆阻器的存储器和密集波分复用来实现节能和超快的深度学习。我们使用商业 CAD 框架 (IPKISS) 在包括 LeNet 和 VGG-Net 在内的深度学习基准模型上评估 LiteCON。与现有技术相比，LiteCON 将 CNN 吞吐量、能源效率和计算效率分别提高了 32 倍、37 倍和 5 倍，但精度略有下降。

items.title: TLB-pilot: Mitigating TLB Contention Attack on GPUs with Microarchitecture-Aware Scheduling.
items.abstract: Co-running GPU kernels on a single GPU can provide high system throughput and improve hardware utilization, but this raises concerns on application security. We reveal that translation lookaside buffer (TLB) attack, one of the common attacks on CPU, can happen on GPU when multiple GPU kernels co-run. We investigate conditions or principles under which a TLB attack can take effect, including the awareness of GPU TLB microarchitecture, being lightweight, and bypassing existing software and hardware mechanisms. This TLB-based attack can be leveraged to conduct Denial-of-Service (or Degradation-of-Service) attacks. Furthermore, we propose a solution to mitigate TLB attacks. In particular, based on the microarchitecture properties of GPU, we introduce a software-based system, TLB-pilot, that binds thread blocks of different kernels to different groups of streaming multiprocessors by considering hardware isolation of last-level TLBs and the application’s resource requirement. TLB-pilot employs lightweight online profiling to collect kernel information before kernel launches. By coordinating software- and hardware-based scheduling and employing a kernel splitting scheme to reduce load imbalance, TLB-pilot effectively mitigates TLB attacks. The result shows that when under TLB attack, TLB-pilot mitigates the attack and provides on average 56.2% and 60.6% improvement in average normalized turnaround times and overall system throughput, respectively, compared to the traditional Multi-Process Service based co-running solution. When under TLB attack, TLB-pilot also provides up to 47.3% and 64.3% improvement (41% and 42.9% on average) in average normalized turnaround times and overall system throughput, respectively, compared to a state-of-the-art co-running solution for efficiently scheduling of thread blocks.
items.abstract_zh: 在单个 GPU 上共同运行 GPU 内核可以提供高系统吞吐量并提高硬件利用率，但这引起了对应用程序安全性的担忧。我们发现，当多个 GPU 内核同时运行时，转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 攻击是对 CPU 的常见攻击之一，也可能在 GPU 上发生。我们研究TLB攻击生效的条件或原理，包括GPU TLB微架构的感知、轻量级以及绕过现有的软硬件机制。这种基于 TLB 的攻击可用于进行拒绝服务（或服务降级）攻击。此外，我们提出了一种缓解 TLB 攻击的解决方案。特别是，基于GPU的微架构特性，我们引入了一种基于软件的系统TLB-pilot，通过考虑最后一级TLB的硬件隔离和应用程序的资源需求，将不同内核的线程块绑定到不同组的流式多处理器。 TLB-pilot 采用轻量级在线分析在内核启动之前收集内核信息。通过协调基于软件和硬件的调度并采用内核分裂方案来减少负载不平衡，TLB-pilot 可以有效缓解 TLB 攻击。结果表明，当受到 TLB 攻击时，TLB-pilot 可以缓解攻击，与传统的基于多进程服务的协同运行解决方案相比，平均标准化周转时间和整体系统吞吐量分别平均提高 56.2% 和 60.6%。当受到 TLB 攻击时，与用于高效调度线程块的最先进的协同运行解决方案相比，TLB-pilot 的平均标准化周转时间和整体系统吞吐量分别提高了 47.3% 和 64.3%（平均 41% 和 42.9%）。

items.title: CARL: Compiler Assigned Reference Leasing.
items.abstract: Data movement is a common performance bottleneck, and its chief remedy is caching. Traditional cache management is transparent to the workload: data that should be kept in cache are determined by the recency information only, while the program information, i.e., future data reuses, is not communicated to the cache. This has changed in a new cache design named Lease Cache . The program control is passed to the lease cache by a compiler technique called Compiler Assigned Reference Lease (CARL). This technique collects the reuse interval distribution for each reference and uses it to compute and assign the lease value to each reference. In this article, we prove that CARL is optimal under certain statistical assumptions. Based on this optimality, we prove miss curve convexity, which is useful for optimizing shared cache, and sub-partitioning monotonicity, which simplifies lease compilation. We evaluate the potential using scientific kernels from PolyBench and show that compiler insertions of up to 34 leases in program code achieve similar or better cache utilization (in variable size cache) than the optimal fixed-size caching policy, which has been unattainable with automatic caching but now within the potential of cache programming for all tested programs and most cache sizes.
items.abstract_zh: 数据移动是一个常见的性能瓶颈，其主要补救措施是缓存。传统的缓存管理对工作负载是透明的：应保留在缓存中的数据仅由最近的信息确定，而程序信息（即未来的数据重用）不会传递到缓存。这在名为 Lease Cache 的新缓存设计中发生了变化。程序控制通过称为编译器分配引用租用 (CARL) 的编译器技术传递到租用高速缓存。该技术收集每个引用的重用间隔分布，并使用它来计算租约值并将其分配给每个引用。在本文中，我们证明 CARL 在某些统计假设下是最优的。基于这种最优性，我们证明了未命中曲线凸性（这对于优化共享缓存非常有用）和子分区单调性（这简化了租约编译）。我们评估了使用 PolyBench 科学内核的潜力，并表明，与最佳固定大小缓存策略相比，在程序代码中插入最多 34 个租约的编译器可实现类似或更好的缓存利用率（在可变大小缓存中），这在自动缓存中是无法实现的，但现在对于所有测试的程序和大多数缓存大小来说都具有缓存编程的潜力。

items.title: GPU Domain Specialization via Composable On-Package Architecture.
items.abstract: As GPUs scale their low-precision matrix math throughput to boost deep learning (DL) performance, they upset the balance between math throughput and memory system capabilities. We demonstrate that a converged GPU design trying to address diverging architectural requirements between FP32 (or larger)-based HPC and FP16 (or smaller)-based DL workloads results in sub-optimal configurations for either of the application domains. We argue that a C omposable O n- PA ckage GPU (COPA-GPU) architecture to provide domain-specialized GPU products is the most practical solution to these diverging requirements. A COPA-GPU leverages multi-chip-module disaggregation to support maximal design reuse, along with memory system specialization per application domain. We show how a COPA-GPU enables DL-specialized products by modular augmentation of the baseline GPU architecture with up to 4× higher off-die bandwidth, 32× larger on-package cache, and 2.3× higher DRAM bandwidth and capacity, while conveniently supporting scaled-down HPC-oriented designs. This work explores the microarchitectural design necessary to enable composable GPUs and evaluates the benefits composability can provide to HPC, DL training, and DL inference. We show that when compared to a converged GPU design, a DL-optimized COPA-GPU featuring a combination of 16× larger cache capacity and 1.6× higher DRAM bandwidth scales per-GPU training and inference performance by 31% and 35%, respectively, and reduces the number of GPU instances by 50% in scale-out training scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 扩展其低精度矩阵数学吞吐量以提高深度学习 (DL) 性能，它们打破了数学吞吐量和内存系统功能之间的平衡。我们证明，尝试解决基于 FP32（或更大）的 HPC 和基于 FP16（或更小）的 DL 工作负载之间不同的架构要求的融合 GPU 设计会导致任一应用程序域的配置都不是最佳的。我们认为，提供领域专用 GPU 产品的可组合式 On-PA GPU (COPA-GPU) 架构是满足这些不同需求的最实用的解决方案。 COPA-GPU 利用多芯片模块分解来支持最大限度的设计重用，以及每个应用程序域的内存系统专业化。我们展示了 COPA-GPU 如何通过对基准 GPU 架构进行模块化增强，提供高达 4 倍的片外带宽、32 倍的封装内缓存以及 2.3 倍的 DRAM 带宽和容量，从而实现 DL 专用产品，同时方便地支持面向 HPC 的缩小设计。这项工作探索了启用可组合 GPU 所需的微架构设计，并评估了可组合性可以为 HPC、深度学习训练和深度学习推理带来的好处。我们表明，与融合 GPU 设计相比，深度优化的 COPA-GPU 结合了 16 倍的高速缓存容量和 1.6 倍的 DRAM 带宽，可将每个 GPU 的训练和推理性能分别提高 31% 和 35%，并在横向扩展训练场景中将 GPU 实例数量减少 50%。

items.title: Adaptive Contention Management for Fine-Grained Synchronization on Commodity GPUs.
items.abstract: As more emerging applications are moving to GPUs, fine-grained synchronization has become imperative. However, their performance can be severely impaired in case of frequent synchronization failures caused by high data contention. Differently from CPUs, GPUs own thousands of hardware threads and adopt single instruction multiple threads paradigm, making it impractical to deploy the CPU contention management mechanisms directly on GPUs. In this article, we design a Software Warp Controlling Framework (SWCF), which employs producer-consumer execution model and leverages GPU hardware barriers to dynamically control the execution of warps at runtime. On the basis of SWCF, we propose a contention management strategy to decrease frequent synchronization failures while avoiding the over-reducing of parallelism. We evaluate SWCF and the proposed strategy on commodity GPUs using a set of applications with fine-grained synchronization. The results show that on V100 GPU our contention management achieves a 4.7X speedup and outperforms the conventional GPU software backoff solution by 42% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的新兴应用程序转向 GPU，细粒度同步变得势在必行。然而，如果由于高数据争用而导致频繁的同步失败，它们的性能可能会受到严重损害。与CPU不同，GPU拥有数千个硬件线程，并采用单指令多线程范式，使得直接在GPU上部署CPU争用管理机制是不切实际的。在本文中，我们设计了一个软件 Warp 控制框架（SWCF），它采用生产者-消费者执行模型，并利用 GPU 硬件屏障在运行时动态控制 warp 的执行。在SWCF的基础上，我们提出了一种争用管理策略，以减少频繁的同步失败，同时避免过度减少并行性。我们使用一组具有细粒度同步的应用程序来评估 SWCF 和针对商用 GPU 提出的策略。结果表明，在 V100 GPU 上，我们的争用管理实现了 4.7 倍的加速，平均比传统 GPU 软件退避解决方案高出 42%。

items.title: CASHT: Contention Analysis in Shared Hierarchies with Thefts.
items.abstract: Cache management policies should consider workloads’ contention behavior when managing a shared cache. Prior art makes estimates about shared cache behavior by adding extra logic or time to isolate per workload cache statistics. These approaches provide per-workload analysis but do not provide a holistic understanding of the utilization and effectiveness of caches under the ever-growing contention that comes standard with scaling cores. We present Contention Analysis in Shared Hierarchies using Thefts, or CASHT, 1 a framework for capturing cache contention information both offline and online. CASHT takes advantage of cache statistics made richer by observing a consequence of cache contention: inter-core evictions, or what we call THEFTS. We use thefts to complement more familiar cache statistics to train a learning model based on Gradient-boosting Trees (GBT) to predict the best ways to partition the last-level cache. GBT achieves 90+% accuracy with trained models as small as 100 B and at least 95% accuracy at 1 kB model size when predicting the best way to partition two workloads. CASHT employs a novel run-time framework for collecting thefts-based metrics despite partition intervention, and enables per-access sampling rather than set sampling that could add overhead but may not capture true workload behavior. Coupling CASHT and GBT for use as a dynamic policy results in a very lightweight and dynamic partitioning scheme that performs within a margin of error of Utility-based Cache Partitioning at a 1/8 the overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 管理共享缓存时，缓存管理策略应考虑工作负载的争用行为。现有技术通过添加额外的逻辑或时间来隔离每个工作负载高速缓存统计数据来对共享高速缓存行为进行估计。这些方法提供了每个工作负载的分析，但无法全面了解在扩展核心标准所带来的不断增长的竞争中缓存的利用率和有效性。我们使用 Thefts（或 CASHT）进行共享层次结构中的争用分析，1 是一个用于捕获离线和在线缓存争用信息的框架。 CASHT 通过观察缓存争用的结果来利用更丰富的缓存统计信息：核心间逐出，或者我们所说的盗窃。我们使用盗窃来补充更熟悉的缓存统计数据，以训练基于梯度提升树（GBT）的学习模型，以预测划分最后一级缓存的最佳方法。在预测划分两个工作负载的最佳方式时，GBT 使用小至 100 B 的训练模型可实现 90% 以上的准确率，在 1 kB 模型大小时可实现至少 95% 的准确率。 CASHT 采用了一种新颖的运行时框架，用于在分区干预的情况下收集基于盗窃的指标，并支持每次访问采样，而不是设置采样，后者可能会增加开销，但可能无法捕获真实的工作负载行为。将 CASHT 和 GBT 结合起来用作动态策略会产生非常轻量级的动态分区方案，该方案在基于实用程序的缓存分区的误差范围内执行，开销仅为 1/8。

items.title: COX : Exposing CUDA Warp-level Functions to CPUs.
items.abstract: As CUDA becomes the de facto programming language among data parallel applications such as high-performance computing or machine learning applications, running CUDA on other platforms becomes a compelling option. Although several efforts have attempted to support CUDA on devices other than NVIDIA GPUs, due to extra steps in the translation, the support is always a few years behind CUDA’s latest features. In particular, the new CUDA programming model exposes the warp concept in the programming language, which greatly changes the way the CUDA code should be mapped to CPU programs. In this article, hierarchical collapsing that correctly supports CUDA warp-level functions on CPUs is proposed. To verify hierarchical collapsing , we build a framework, COX , that supports executing CUDA source code on the CPU backend. With hierarchical collapsing , 90% of kernels in CUDA SDK samples can be executed on CPUs, much higher than previous works (68%). We also evaluate the performance with benchmarks for real applications and show that hierarchical collapsing can generate CPU programs with comparable or even higher performance than previous projects in general.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 CUDA 成为数据并行应用程序（例如高性能计算或机器学习应用程序）中事实上的编程语言，在其他平台上运行 CUDA 成为一个引人注目的选择。尽管已经尝试在 NVIDIA GPU 以外的设备上支持 CUDA，但由于转换过程中存在额外步骤，该支持始终落后于 CUDA 的最新功能几年。特别是，新的 CUDA 编程模型公开了编程语言中的 warp 概念，这极大地改变了 CUDA 代码映射到 CPU 程序的方式。在本文中，提出了在 CPU 上正确支持 CUDA 扭曲级函数的分层折叠。为了验证分层折叠，我们构建了一个框架 COX，它支持在 CPU 后端执行 CUDA 源代码。通过分层折叠，CUDA SDK 示例中 90% 的内核可以在 CPU 上执行，远高于以前的作品 (68%)。我们还通过实际应用程序的基准来评估性能，并表明分层折叠可以生成与以前的项目性能相当甚至更高的 CPU 程序。

items.title: Just-In-Time Compilation on ARM - A Closer Look at Call-Site Code Consistency.
items.abstract: The increase in computational capability of low-power Arm architectures has seen them diversify from their more traditional domain of portable battery powered devices into data center servers, personal computers, and even Supercomputers. Thus, managed languages (Java, Javascript, etc.) that require a managed runtime environment (MRE) need to be ported to the Arm architecture, requiring an understanding of different design tradeoffs. This article studies how the lack of strong hardware support for Self Modifying Code (SMC) in low-power architectures (e.g., absence of cache coherence between instruction cache and data caches), affects Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation and runtime behavior in MREs. Specifically, we focus on the implementation and treatment of call-sites, that must maintain code consistency in the face of concurrent execution and modification to redirect control (patching) by the MRE. The lack of coherence, is compounded with the maximum distance (reach of) a call-site can jump to as the reach is more constrained (smaller distance) in Arm when compared with Intel/AMD. We present four different robust implementations for call-sites and discuss their advantages and disadvantages in the absence of strong hardware support for SMC. Finally, we evaluate each approach using a microbenchmark, further evaluating the best three techniques using three JVM benchmark suites and the open source MaxineVM showcasing performance differences up to 12%. Based on these observations, we propose extending code-cache partitioning strategies for JIT compiled code to encourage more efficient local branching for architectures with limited direct branch ranges.
items.abstract_zh: 低功耗 Arm 架构计算能力的提高使其从更传统的便携式电池供电设备领域扩展到数据中心服务器、个人计算机，甚至超级计算机。因此，需要托管运行时环境 (MRE) 的托管语言（Java、Javascript 等）需要移植到 Arm 架构，需要了解不同的设计权衡。本文研究了低功耗架构中缺乏对自修改代码 (SMC) 的强大硬件支持（例如，指令缓存和数据缓存之间缺乏缓存一致性）如何影响 MRE 中的即时 (JIT) 编译和运行时行为。具体来说，我们专注于调用站点的实现和处理，在面对并发执行和 MRE 重定向控制（修补）的修改时，必须保持代码一致性。由于与 Intel/AMD 相比，Arm 中的到达范围受到更多限制（更小的距离），因此缺乏一致性，并且调用站点可以跳转到的最大距离（到达范围）也变得更加复杂。我们为调用站点提供了四种不同的稳健实现，并讨论了在缺乏 SMC 强大硬件支持的情况下它们的优缺点。最后，我们使用微基准测试来评估每种方法，并使用三个 JVM 基准测试套件和开源 MaxineVM 进一步评估最佳的三种技术，显示性能差异高达 12%。基于这些观察，我们建议扩展 JIT 编译代码的代码缓存分区策略，以鼓励直接分支范围有限的架构实现更高效的本地分支。

items.title: Using Barrier Elision to Improve Transactional Code Generation.
items.abstract: With chip manufacturers such as Intel, IBM, and ARM offering native support for transactional memory in their instruction set architectures, memory transactions are on the verge of being considered a genuine application tool rather than just an interesting research topic. Despite this recent increase in popularity on the hardware side of transactional memory (HTM) , software support for transactional memory (STM) is still scarce and the only compiler with transactional support currently available, the GNU Compiler Collection (GCC) , does not generate code that achieves desirable performance. For hybrid solutions of TM (HyTM) , which are frameworks that leverage the best aspects of HTM and STM, the subpar performance of the software side, caused by inefficient compiler generated code, might forbid HyTM to offer optimal results. This article extends previous work focused exclusively on STM implementations by presenting a detailed analysis of transactional code generated by GCC in the context of HybridTM implementations. In particular, it builds on previous research of transactional memory support in the Clang/LLVM compiler framework, which is decoupled from any TM runtime, and presents the following novel contributions: (a) it shows that STM’s performance overhead, due to an excessive amount of read and write barriers added by the compiler, also impacts the performance of HyTM systems; and (b) it reveals the importance of the previously proposed annotation mechanism to reduce the performance gap between HTM and STM in phased runtime systems. Furthermore, it shows that, by correctly using the annotations on just a few lines of code, it is possible to reduce the total number of instrumented barriers by 95% and to achieve speed-ups of up to 7× when compared to the original code generated by GCC and the Clang compiler. 1
items.abstract_zh: 随着英特尔、IBM 和 ARM 等芯片制造商在其指令集架构中提供对事务内存的本机支持，内存事务即将被视为真正的应用工具，而不仅仅是一个有趣的研究主题。尽管事务内存 (HTM) 的硬件方面最近越来越受欢迎，但对事务内存 (STM) 的软件支持仍然很少，并且当前唯一提供事务支持的编译器 GNU 编译器集合 (GCC) 无法生成达到理想性能的代码。对于 TM (HyTM) 的混合解决方案（这些框架利用了 HTM 和 STM 的最佳方面），由于编译器生成的代码效率低下而导致软件方面的性能不佳，可能会阻止 HyTM 提供最佳结果。本文通过在 HybridTM 实现的上下文中对 GCC 生成的事务代码进行详细分析，扩展了之前专门关注 STM 实现的工作。特别是，它建立在先前对 Clang/LLVM 编译器框架中事务内存支持的研究基础上，该框架与任何 TM 运行时解耦，并提出了以下新颖的贡献：（a）它表明，由于编译器添加的过多读写障碍，STM 的性能开销也会影响 HyTM 系统的性能； (b)它揭示了先前提出的注释机制对于缩小阶段运行时系统中 HTM 和 STM 之间的性能差距的重要性。此外，它表明，通过在几行代码上正确使用注释，与 GCC 和 Clang 编译器生成的原始代码相比，可以将检测障碍的总数减少 95%，并实现高达 7 倍的加速。 1

items.title: Accelerating Video Captioning on Heterogeneous System Architectures.
items.abstract: Video captioning is a core technology to many important applications, such as AI-assisted medical diagnosis, video question answering, storytelling through videos, and lip-reading. Video captioning employs a hybrid CNN + RNN model. Accelerating such a hybrid model on a heterogeneous system is challenging for two reasons. First, CNN and RNN exhibit very different computing behaviors, making the mapping between computation and heterogeneous devices difficult. Second, data dependency exists between the CNN and RNN within a video frame and between adjacent RNNs across video frames. These data dependencies prohibit the full parallelization of the hybrid model. The issues also include the utilization of accelerator resources, which is critical to maximizing the performance. In this work, we propose a fine-grained scheduling scheme for mapping computation and devices within a video frame, and a pipeline scheduling scheme for exploiting maximum parallelism between the execution of the video frames. In addition, we propose two capacity-guided scheduling methods. On the server, the concurrent kernel execution mechanism is exploited for improving GPU utilization. On the edge platform, we rearrange CNN computation among the CPU and EdgeTPUs guided by the EdgeTPU’s SRAM capacity so that balanced computation is achieved and off-chip memory overhead is minimized. Experimental results show that our scheduling scheme improves video captioning performance by up to 3.24 \( \times \) with CPU + GPU collaboration over the GPU-only execution. On an edge platform with an ARM CPU and two EdgeTPUs, our CPU + EdgeTPU scheduling exhibits outstanding performance, which achieves up to 54.9 \( \times \) speedup compared to using ARM CPU only and can perform video captioning of 59 frames per second.
items.abstract_zh: 视频字幕是人工智能辅助医疗诊断、视频问答、视频讲故事、唇读等许多重要应用的核心技术。视频字幕采用混合 CNN + RNN 模型。在异构系统上加速这种混合模型具有挑战性，原因有两个。首先，CNN和RNN表现出截然不同的计算行为，使得计算和异构设备之间的映射变得困难。其次，视频帧内的 CNN 和 RNN 之间以及跨视频帧的相邻 RNN 之间存在数据依赖性。这些数据依赖性阻碍了混合模型的完全并行化。这些问题还包括加速器资源的利用，这对于最大化性能至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于在视频帧内映射计算和设备的细粒度调度方案，以及一种用于利用视频帧执行之间的最大并行性的管道调度方案。此外，我们提出了两种容量引导的调度方法。在服务器上，利用并发内核执行机制来提高GPU利用率。在边缘平台上，我们在 EdgeTPU 的 SRAM 容量引导下重新安排 CPU 和 EdgeTPU 之间的 CNN 计算，从而实现平衡计算并最小化片外内存开销。实验结果表明，我们的调度方案通过 CPU + GPU 协作比仅 GPU 执行提高了视频字幕性能高达 3.24 \(\times\)。在具有 ARM CPU 和两个 EdgeTPU 的边缘平台上，我们的 CPU + EdgeTPU 调度表现出出色的性能，与仅使用 ARM CPU 相比，实现了高达 54.9 倍的加速，并且可以执行每秒 59 帧的视频字幕。

items.title: PowerMorph: QoS-Aware Server Power Reshaping for Data Center Regulation Service.
items.abstract: Adoption of renewable energy in power grids introduces stability challenges in regulating the operation frequency of the electricity grid. Thus, electrical grid operators call for provisioning of frequency regulation services from end-user customers, such as data centers, to help balance the power grid’s stability by dynamically adjusting their energy consumption based on the power grid’s need. As renewable energy adoption grows, the average reward price of frequency regulation services has become much higher than that of the electricity cost. Therefore, there is a great cost incentive for data centers to provide frequency regulation service. Many existing techniques modulating data center power result in significant performance slowdown or provide a low amount of frequency regulation provision. We present PowerMorph , a tight QoS-aware data center power-reshaping framework, which enables commodity servers to provide practical frequency regulation service. The key behind PowerMorph is using “complementary workload” as an additional knob to modulate server power, which provides high provision capacity while satisfying tight QoS constraints of latency-critical workloads. We achieve up to 58% improvement to TCO under common conditions, and in certain cases can even completely eliminate the data center electricity bill and provide a net profit.
items.abstract_zh: 电网采用可再生能源给调节电网运行频率带来了稳定性挑战。因此，电网运营商呼吁数据中心等终端客户提供调频服务，根据电网需求动态调整能耗，帮助平衡电网稳定性。随着可再生能源应用的增长，调频服务的平均奖励价格已远高于电力成本。因此，数据中心提供调频服务有很大的成本激励。许多现有的数据中心功率调制技术会导致性能显着下降或提供少量的频率调节。我们推出了 PowerMorph，这是一个严格的 QoS 感知数据中心电源重塑框架，它使商用服务器能够提供实用的频率调节服务。 PowerMorph 背后的关键是使用“补充工作负载”作为调节服务器功率的附加旋钮，从而提供高配置容量，同时满足延迟关键型工作负载的严格 QoS 限制。在一般情况下，我们实现了高达58%的TCO提升，在某些情况下甚至可以完全消除数据中心电费并提供净利润。

items.title: Solving Sparse Assignment Problems on FPGAs.
items.abstract: The assignment problem is a fundamental optimization problem and a crucial part of many systems. For example, in multiple object tracking, the assignment problem is used to associate object detections with hypothetical target tracks and solving the assignment problem is one of the most compute-intensive tasks. To enable low-latency real-time implementations, efficient solutions to the assignment problem is required. In this work, we present Sparse and Speculative (SaS) Auction, a novel implementation of the popular Auction algorithm for FPGAs. Two novel optimizations are proposed. First, the pipeline width and depth are reduced by exploiting sparsity in the input problems. Second, dependency speculation is employed to enable a fully pipelined design and increase the throughput. Speedups as high as 50 × are achieved relative to the state-of-the-art implementation for some input distributions. We evaluate the implementation both on randomly generated datasets and realistic datasets from multiple object tracking.
items.abstract_zh: 分配问题是一个基本的优化问题，也是许多系统的关键部分。例如，在多对象跟踪中，分配问题用于将对象检测与假设的目标轨迹相关联，并且解决分配问题是计算最密集的任务之一。为了实现低延迟实时实现，需要有效的解决分配问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了稀疏和推测 (SaS) 拍卖，这是流行的 FPGA 拍卖算法的一种新颖实现。提出了两种新颖的优化。首先，通过利用输入问题的稀疏性来减少管道的宽度和深度。其次，采用依赖推测来实现完全流水线设计并提高吞吐量。相对于某些输入分布的最先进实现，速度提升高达 50 倍。我们在随机生成的数据集和来自多个对象跟踪的实际数据集上评估实施情况。

items.title: GiantVM: A Novel Distributed Hypervisor for Resource Aggregation with DSM-aware Optimizations.
items.abstract: We present GiantVM, 1 an open-source distributed hypervisor that provides the many-to-one virtualization to aggregate resources from multiple physical machines. We propose techniques to enable distributed CPU and I/O virtualization and distributed shared memory (DSM) to achieve memory aggregation. GiantVM is implemented based on the state-of-the-art type-II hypervisor QEMU-KVM, and it can currently host conventional OSes such as Linux. (1) We identify the performance bottleneck of GiantVM to be DSM, through a top-down performance analysis. Although GiantVM offers great opportunities for CPU-intensive applications to enjoy the aggregated CPU resources, memory-intensive applications could suffer from cross-node page sharing, which requires frequent DSM involvement and leads to performance collapse. We design the guest-level thread scheduler, DaS (DSM-aware Scheduler), to overcome the bottleneck. When benchmarking with NAS Parallel Benchmarks, the DaS could achieve a performance boost of up to 3.5×, compared to the default Linux kernel scheduler. (2) While evaluating DaS, we observe the advantage of GiantVM as a resource reallocation facility. Thanks to the SSI abstraction of GiantVM, migration could be done by guest-level scheduling. DSM allows standby pages in the migration destination, which need not be transferred through the network. The saved network bandwidth is 68% on average, compared to VM live migration. Resource reallocation with GiantVM increases the overall CPU utilization by 14.3% in a co-location experiment.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 GiantVM，1 一个开源分布式虚拟机管理程序，它提供多对一虚拟化来聚合来自多个物理机的资源。我们提出了支持分布式 CPU 和 I/O 虚拟化以及分布式共享内存 (DSM) 的技术，以实现内存聚合。 GiantVM基于最先进的II型管理程序QEMU-KVM实现，目前可以托管Linux等传统操作系统。 (1)通过自上而下的性能分析，确定GiantVM的性能瓶颈为DSM。虽然 GiantVM 为 CPU 密集型应用程序提供了享受聚合 CPU 资源的绝佳机会，但内存密集型应用程序可能会受到跨节点页面共享的影响，这需要频繁的 DSM 参与并导致性能崩溃。我们设计了客户级线程调度程序 DaS（DSM 感知调度程序）来克服瓶颈。在使用 NAS 并行基准进行基准测试时，与默认的 Linux 内核调度程序相比，DaS 的性能提升高达 3.5 倍。 (2) 在评估 DaS 时，我们观察到 GiantVM 作为资源重新分配工具的优势。由于 GiantVM 的 SSI 抽象，迁移可以通过客户级调度来完成。 DSM 允许迁移目的地中的备用页面，无需通过网络传输。与虚拟机热迁移相比，平均节省网络带宽68%。在共置实验中，使用 GiantVM 进行资源重新分配将总体 CPU 利用率提高了 14.3%。

items.title: Dependence-aware Slice Execution to Boost MLP in Slice-out-of-order Cores.
items.abstract: Exploiting memory-level parallelism (MLP) is crucial to hide long memory and last-level cache access latencies. While out-of-order (OoO) cores, and techniques building on them, are effective at exploiting MLP, they deliver poor energy efficiency due to their complex and energy-hungry hardware. This work revisits slice-out-of-order (sOoO) cores as an energy-efficient alternative for MLP exploitation. sOoO cores achieve energy efficiency by constructing and executing slices of MLP-generating instructions out-of-order only with respect to the rest of instructions; the slices and the remaining instructions, by themselves, execute in-order. However, we observe that existing sOoO cores miss significant MLP opportunities due to their dependence-oblivious in-order slice execution, which causes dependent slices to frequently block MLP generation. To boost MLP generation, we introduce Freeway, a sOoO core based on a new dependence-aware slice execution policy that tracks dependent slices and keeps them from blocking subsequent independent slices and MLP extraction. The proposed core incurs minimal area and power overheads, yet approaches the MLP benefits of fully OoO cores. Our evaluation shows that Freeway delivers 12% better performance than the state-of-the-art sOoO core and is within 7% of the MLP limits of full OoO execution.
items.abstract_zh: 利用内存级并行性 (MLP) 对于隐藏长内存和末级缓存访问延迟至关重要。虽然乱序 (OoO) 内核以及基于它们的技术可以有效地利用 MLP，但由于其复杂且耗能的硬件，它们的能效较差。这项工作重新审视了乱序切片 (sOoO) 内核，将其作为 MLP 开发的节能替代方案。 sOoO 内核通过仅相对于其余指令乱序构造和执行 MLP 生成指令片段来实现能源效率；切片和其余指令本身按顺序执行。然而，我们观察到现有的 sOoO 内核由于其依赖无关的有序切片执行而错过了重要的 MLP 机会，这导致依赖切片频繁地阻止 MLP 生成。为了促进 MLP 生成，我们引入了 Freeway，这是一个基于新的依赖感知切片执行策略的 sOoO 核心，该策略可跟踪依赖切片并防止它们阻塞后续的独立切片和 MLP 提取。所提出的核心带来最小的面积和功率开销，但接近完全 OoO 核心的 MLP 优势。我们的评估表明，Freeway 的性能比最先进的 sOoO 内核高出 12%，且与完整 OoO 执行的 MLP 限制相差不到 7%。

items.title: A Pressure-Aware Policy for Contention Minimization on Multicore Systems.
items.abstract: Modern Chip Multiprocessors (CMPs) are integrating an increasing amount of cores to address the continually growing demand for high-application performance. The cores of a CMP share several components of the memory hierarchy, such as Last-Level Cache (LLC) and main memory. This allows for considerable gains in multithreaded applications while also helping to maintain architectural simplicity. However, sharing resources can also result in performance bottleneck due to contention among concurrently executing applications. In this work, we formulate a fine-grained application characterization methodology that leverages Performance Monitoring Counters (PMCs) and Cache Monitoring Technology (CMT) in Intel processors. We utilize this characterization methodology to develop two contention-aware scheduling policies, one static and one dynamic , that co-schedule applications based on their resource-interference profiles. Our approach focuses on minimizing contention on both the main-memory bandwidth and the LLC by monitoring the pressure that each application inflicts on these resources. We achieve performance benefits for diverse workloads, outperforming Linux and three state-of-the-art contention-aware schedulers in terms of system throughput and fairness for both single and multithreaded workloads. Compared with Linux, our policy achieves up to 16% greater throughput for single-threaded and up to 40% greater throughput for multithreaded applications. Additionally, the policies increase fairness by up to 65% for single-threaded and up to 130% for multithreaded ones.
items.abstract_zh: 现代芯片多处理器 (CMP) 正在集成越来越多的内核，以满足对高应用性能不断增长的需求。 CMP 的核心共享内存层次结构的多个组件，例如末级高速缓存 (LLC) 和主内存。这可以在多线程应用程序中获得相当大的收益，同时也有助于保持架构的简单性。然而，由于并发执行的应用程序之间的争用，共享资源也可能导致性能瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们制定了一种细粒度的应用程序表征方法，该方法利用英特尔处理器中的性能监控计数器 (PMC) 和缓存监控技术 (CMT)。我们利用这种表征方法来开发两种竞争感知调度策略，一种是静态的，一种是动态的，它们根据应用程序的资源干扰配置文件来共同调度应用程序。我们的方法侧重于通过监控每个应用程序对这些资源造成的压力来最大程度地减少对主内存带宽和 LLC 的争用。我们为不同的工作负载实现了性能优势，在单线程和多线程工作负载的系统吞吐量和公平性方面，其性能优于 Linux 和三个最先进的竞争感知调度程序。与 Linux 相比，我们的策略使单线程应用程序的吞吐量提高了 16%，多线程应用程序的吞吐量提高了 40%。此外，这些策略将单线程的公平性提高了 65%，将多线程的公平性提高了 130%。

items.title: The Forward Slice Core: A High-Performance, Yet Low-Complexity Microarchitecture.
items.abstract: Superscalar out-of-order cores deliver high performance at the cost of increased complexity and power budget. In-order cores, in contrast, are less complex and have a smaller power budget, but offer low performance. A processor architecture should ideally provide high performance in a power- and cost-efficient manner. Recently proposed slice-out-of-order (sOoO) cores identify backward slices of memory operations which they execute out-of-order with respect to the rest of the dynamic instruction stream for increased instruction-level and memory-hierarchy parallelism. Unfortunately, constructing backward slices is imprecise and hardware-inefficient, leaving performance on the table. In this article, we propose Forward Slice Core (FSC ), a novel core microarchitecture that builds on a stall-on-use in-order core and extracts more instruction-level and memory-hierarchy parallelism than slice-out-of-order cores. FSC does so by identifying and steering forward slices (rather than backward slices) to dedicated in-order FIFO queues. Moreover, FSC puts load-consumers that depend on L1 D-cache misses on the side to enable younger independent load-consumers to execute faster. Finally, FSC eliminates the need for dynamic memory disambiguation by replicating store-address instructions across queues. Considering 3-wide pipeline configurations, we find that FSC improves performance by 27.1%, 21.1%, and 14.6% on average compared to Freeway, the state-of-the-art sOoO core, across SPEC CPU2017, GAP, and DaCapo, respectively, while at the same time incurring reduced hardware complexity. Compared to an OoO core, FSC reduces power consumption by 61.3% and chip area by 47%, providing a microarchitecture with high performance at low complexity.
items.abstract_zh: 超标量乱序内核可提供高性能，但代价是增加复杂性和功耗预算。相比之下，有序内核的复杂性较低，功耗预算也较小，但性能较低。理想情况下，处理器架构应以节能且经济高效的方式提供高性能。最近提出的乱序切片 (sOoO) 内核识别向后的内存操作切片，它们相对于动态指令流的其余部分乱序执行这些操作，以提高指令级和内存层次结构的并行性。不幸的是，构建向后切片不精确且硬件效率低下，导致性能受到影响。在本文中，我们提出了前向切片核心（FSC），这是一种新颖的核心微架构，它构建在使用时停止的有序核心上，并比切片乱序核心提取更多的指令级和内存层次结构并行性。 FSC 通过识别前向切片（而不是后向切片）并将其引导至专用的有序 FIFO 队列来实现此目的。此外，FSC 将依赖于 L1 D 缓存未命中的负载消费者放在一边，以使年轻的独立负载消费者能够更快地执行。最后，FSC 通过跨队列复制存储地址指令，消除了动态内存消歧的需要。考虑到 3 宽管道配置，我们发现，与最先进的 sOoO 核心 Freeway 相比，FSC 在 SPEC CPU2017、GAP 和 DaCapo 上的性能平均提高了 27.1%、21.1% 和 14.6%，同时降低了硬件复杂性。与 OoO 内核相比，FSC 功耗降低了 61.3%，芯片面积降低了 47%，提供了高性能、低复杂度的微架构。

items.title: SMT-Based Contention-Free Task Mapping and Scheduling on 2D/3D SMART NoC with Mixed Dimension-Order Routing.
items.abstract: SMART NoCs achieve ultra-low latency by enabling single-cycle multiple-hop transmission via bypass channels. However, contention along bypass channels can seriously degrade the performance of SMART NoCs by breaking the bypass paths. Therefore, contention-free task mapping and scheduling are essential for optimal system performance. In this article, we propose an SMT (Satisfiability Modulo Theories)-based framework to find optimal contention-free task mappings with minimum application schedule lengths on 2D/3D SMART NoCs with mixed dimension-order routing. On top of SMT’s fast reasoning capability for conditional constraints, we develop efficient search-space reduction techniques to achieve practical scalability. Experiments demonstrate that our SMT framework achieves 10× higher scalability than ILP (Integer Linear Programming) with 931.1× (ranges from 2.2× to 1532.1×) and 1237.1× (ranges from 4× to 4373.8×) faster average runtimes for finding optimum solutions on 2D and 3D SMART NoCs and our 2D and 3D extensions of the SMT framework with mixed dimension-order routing also maintain the improved scalability with the extended and diversified routing paths, resulting in reduced application schedule lengths throughout various application benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: SMART NoC 通过旁路通道实现单周期多跳传输，从而实现超低延迟。然而，旁路通道上的争用会破坏旁路路径，从而严重降低 SMART NoC 的性能。因此，无争用的任务映射和调度对于优化系统性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 SMT（可满足性模理论）的框架，用于在具有混合维度顺序路由的 2D/3D SMART NoC 上找到具有最小应用程序调度长度的最佳无争用任务映射。除了 SMT 针对条件约束的快速推理能力之外，我们还开发了高效的搜索空间缩减技术，以实现实际的可扩展性。实验表明，我们的 SMT 框架实现了比 ILP（整数线性规划）高 10 倍的可扩展性，平均运行时间加快了 931.1 倍（范围从 2.2 倍到 1532.1 倍）和 1237.1 倍（范围从 4 倍到 4373.8 倍），可以在 2D 和 3D SMART NoC 以及我们的 SMT 框架的 2D 和 3D 扩展上找到最佳解决方案。混合维序路由还通过扩展和多样化的路由路径保持了改进的可扩展性，从而缩短了各种应用程序基准测试中的应用程序调度长度。

items.title: SecNVM: An Efficient and Write-Friendly Metadata Crash Consistency Scheme for Secure NVM.
items.abstract: Data security is an indispensable part of non-volatile memory (NVM) systems. However, implementing data security efficiently on NVM is challenging, since we have to guarantee the consistency of user data and the related security metadata. Existing consistency schemes ignore the recoverability of the SGX style integrity tree (SIT) and the access correlation between metadata blocks, thereby generating unnecessary NVM write traffic. In this article, we propose SecNVM, an efficient and write-friendly metadata crash consistency scheme for secure NVM. SecNVM utilizes the observation that for a lazily updated SIT, the lost tree nodes after a crash can be recovered by the corresponding child nodes in NVM. It reduces the SIT persistency overhead through a restrained write-back metadata cache and exploits the SIT inter-layer dependency for recovery. Next, leveraging the strong access correlation between the counter and DMAC, SecNVM improves the efficiency of security metadata access through a novel collaborative counter-DMAC scheme. In addition, it adopts a lightweight address tracker to reduce the cost of address tracking for fast recovery. Experiments show that compared to the state-of-the-art schemes, SecNVM improves the performance and decreases write traffic a lot, and achieves an acceptable recovery time.
items.abstract_zh: 数据安全是非易失性存储器（NVM）系统不可或缺的一部分。然而，在NVM上有效地实现数据安全具有挑战性，因为我们必须保证用户数据和相关安全元数据的一致性。现有的一致性方案忽略了SGX样式完整性树（SIT）的可恢复性以及元数据块之间的访问相关性，从而产生了不必要的NVM写入流量。在本文中，我们提出了 SecNVM，一种用于安全 NVM 的高效且写入友好的元数据崩溃一致性方案。 SecNVM 利用这样的观察结果：对于延迟更新的 SIT，崩溃后丢失的树节点可以由 NVM 中相应的子节点恢复。它通过受限制的回写元数据缓存减少了 SIT 持久性开销，并利用 SIT 层间依赖性进行恢复。接下来，利用计数器和DMAC之间强大的访问相关性，SecNVM通过新颖的协作计数器DMAC方案提高了安全元数据访问的效率。此外，它采用轻量级地址跟踪器，降低地址跟踪成本，实现快速恢复。实验表明，与最先进的方案相比，SecNVM 大大提高了性能并减少了写入流量，并实现了可接受的恢复时间。

items.title: MUA-Router: Maximizing the Utility-of-Allocation for On-chip Pipelining Routers.
items.abstract: As an important pipeline stage in the router of Network-on-Chips, switch allocation assigns output ports to input ports and allows flits to transit through the switch without conflicts. Previous work designed efficient switch allocation strategies by maximizing the matching efficiency in time series. However, those works neglected the interaction between different router pipeline stages. In this article, we propose the concept of Utility-of-Allocation (UoA) to indicate the quality of allocation to be practically used in on-chip routers. We demonstrate that router pipelines can interact with each other, and the UoA can be maximized if the interaction between router pipelines is taken into consideration. Based on these observations, a novel class of routers, MUA-Router, is proposed to maximize the UoA through the collaborative design (co-design) between router pipelines. MUA-Router achieves this goal in two ways and accordingly implements two novel instance router architectures. In the first, MUA-Router improves the UoA by mitigating the impact of endpoint congestion in the switch allocation, and thus Eca-Router is proposed. Eca-Router achieves an endpoint-congestion-aware switch allocation through the co-design between routing computation and switch allocation. Based on Eca-Router, CoD-Router is proposed to feed back switch allocation information to routing computation stage to provide switch allocator with more conflict-free requests. Through the co-design between pipelines, MUA-Router significantly improves the efficiency of switch allocation and the performance of the entire network. Evaluation results show that our design can achieve significant performance improvement with moderate overheads.
items.abstract_zh: 作为片上网络路由器中重要的管道阶段，交换机分配将输出端口分配给输入端口，并允许flit通过交换机而不会发生冲突。先前的工作通过最大化时间序列中的匹配效率来设计高效的开关分配策略。然而，这些工作忽略了不同路由器管道阶段之间的交互。在本文中，我们提出了分配效用（UoA）的概念来指示片上路由器中实际使用的分配质量。我们证明了路由器管道可以相互交互，如果考虑路由器管道之间的交互，则 UoA 可以最大化。基于这些观察，提出了一类新型路由器——MUA-Router，通过路由器管道之间的协作设计（协同设计）来最大化UoA。 MUA-Router 通过两种方式实现这一目标，并相应地实现了两种新颖的实例路由器架构。首先，MUA-Router通过减轻交换机分配中端点拥塞的影响来提高UoA，因此提出了Eca-Router。 Eca-Router通过路由计算和交换机分配之间的协同设计实现了端点拥塞感知的交换机分配。在Eca-Router的基础上，提出了CoD-Router，将交换机分配信息反馈到路由计算阶段，为交换机分配器提供更多无冲突的请求。通过管道之间的协同设计，MUA-Router显着提高了交换机分配效率和整个网络的性能。评估结果表明，我们的设计可以在适度的开销下实现显着的性能提升。

items.title: Phronesis: Efficient Performance Modeling for High-dimensional Configuration Tuning.
items.abstract: We present Phronesis, a learning framework for efficiently modeling the performance of data analytic workloads as a function of their high-dimensional software configuration parameters. Accurate performance models are useful for efficiently optimizing data analytic performance. Phronesis explicitly considers the error decomposition in statistical learning and implications for efficient data acquisition and model growth strategies in performance modeling. We demonstrate Phronesis with three popular machine learning models commonly used in performance tuning: neural network, random forest, and regression spline. We implement and evaluate it for Spark configuration parameters. We show that Phronesis significantly reduces data collection time for training predictive models by up to 57% and 37%, on average, compared to state-of-the-art techniques in building Spark performance models. Furthermore, we construct a configuration autotuning pipeline based on Phronesis. Our results indicate up to 30% gains in performance for Spark workloads over previous, state-of-the-art tuning strategies that use high-dimensional models.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Phronesis，这是一个学习框架，用于根据高维软件配置参数对数据分析工作负载的性能进行有效建模。准确的性能模型对于有效优化数据分析性能非常有用。 Phronesis 明确考虑了统计学习中的错误分解以及性能建模中高效数据采集和模型增长策略的影响。我们使用性能调优中常用的三种流行机器学习模型来演示 Phronesis：神经网络、随机森林和回归样条。我们实施并评估 Spark 配置参数。我们发现，与构建 Spark 性能模型的最先进技术相比，Phronesis 显着减少了训练预测模型的数据收集时间，平均分别高达 57% 和 37%。此外，我们构建了一个基于 Phronesis 的配置自动调整管道。我们的结果表明，与之前使用高维模型的最先进的调优策略相比，Spark 工作负载的性能提升高达 30%。

items.title: An Application-oblivious Memory Scheduling System for DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) tend to go deeper and wider, which poses a significant challenge to the training of DNNs, due to the limited memory capacity of DNN accelerators. Existing solutions for memory-efficient DNN training are densely coupled with the application features of DNN workloads, e.g., layer structures or computational graphs of DNNs are necessary for these solutions. This would result in weak versatility for DNNs with sophisticated layer structures or complicated computation graphs. These schemes usually need to be re-implemented or re-adapted due to the new layer structures or the unusual operators in the computational graphs introduced by these DNNs. In this article, we review the memory pressure issues of DNN training from the perspective of runtime systems and model the memory access behaviors of DNN workloads. We identify the iterative, regularity , and extremalization properties of memory access patterns for DNN workloads. Based on these observations, we propose AppObMem, an application-oblivious memory scheduling system. AppObMem automatically traces the memory behaviors of DNN workloads and schedules the memory swapping to reduce the memory pressure of the device accelerators without the perception of high-level information of layer structures or computation graphs. Evaluations on a variety of DNN models show that, AppObMem obtains 40–60% memory savings with acceptable performance loss. AppObMem is also competitive with other open sourced SOTA schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）趋向于更深、更宽，由于 DNN 加速器的内存容量有限，这对 DNN 的训练提出了重大挑战。现有的内存高效 DNN 训练解决方案与 DNN 工作负载的应用特征紧密耦合，例如，DNN 的层结构或计算图是这些解决方案所必需的。这将导致具有复杂层结构或复杂计算图的 DNN 的通用性较弱。由于这些 DNN 引入的计算图中的新层结构或不常见运算符，这些方案通常需要重新实现或重新调整。在本文中，我们从运行时系统的角度回顾了 DNN 训练的内存压力问题，并对 DNN 工作负载的内存访问行为进行了建模。我们确定了 DNN 工作负载内存访问模式的迭代、规律性和极值化属性。基于这些观察，我们提出了 AppObMem，一种应用程序无关的内存调度系统。 AppObMem 自动跟踪 DNN 工作负载的内存行为并安排内存交换，以减少设备加速器的内存压力，而无需感知层结构或计算图的高级信息。对各种 DNN 模型的评估表明，AppObMem 在可接受的性能损失的情况下节省了 40-60% 的内存。 AppObMem 与其他开源 SOTA 方案也具有竞争力。

items.title: Iterative Compilation Optimization Based on Metric Learning and Collaborative Filtering.
items.abstract: Pass selection and phase ordering are two critical compiler auto-tuning problems. Traditional heuristic methods cannot effectively address these NP-hard problems especially given the increasing number of compiler passes and diverse hardware architectures. Recent research efforts have attempted to address these problems through machine learning. However, the large search space of candidate pass sequences, the large numbers of redundant and irrelevant features, and the lack of training program instances make it difficult to learn models well. Several methods have tried to use expert knowledge to simplify the problems, such as using only the compiler passes or subsequences in the standard levels (e.g., -O1, -O2, and -O3) provided by compiler designers. However, these methods ignore other useful compiler passes that are not contained in the standard levels. Principal component analysis (PCA) and exploratory factor analysis (EFA) have been utilized to reduce the redundancy of feature data. However, these unsupervised methods retain all the information irrelevant to the performance of compilation optimization, which may mislead the subsequent model learning. To solve these problems, we propose a compiler pass selection and phase ordering approach, called Iterative Compilation based on Metric learning and Collaborative filtering (ICMC) . First, we propose a data-driven method to construct pass subsequences according to the observed collaborative interactions and dependency among passes on a given program set. Therefore, we can make use of all available compiler passes and prune the search space. Then, a supervised metric learning method is utilized to retain useful feature information for compilation optimization while removing both the irrelevant and the redundant information. Based on the learned similarity metric, a neighborhood-based collaborative filtering method is employed to iteratively recommend a few superior compiler passes for each target program. Last, an iterative data enhancement method is designed to alleviate the problem of lacking training program instances and to enhance the performance of iterative pass recommendations. The experimental results using the LLVM compiler on all 32 cBench programs show the following: (1) ICMC significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art compiler phase ordering methods, (2) it performs the same or better than the standard level -O3 on all the test programs, and (3) it can reach an average performance speedup of 1.20 (up to 1.46) compared with the standard level -O3.
items.abstract_zh: 通道选择和阶段排序是两个关键的编译器自动调整问题。传统的启发式方法无法有效解决这些 NP 难题，特别是考虑到编译器遍数不断增加和硬件架构多样化。最近的研究工作试图通过机器学习来解决这些问题。然而，候选通道序列的巨大搜索空间、大量冗余和不相关的特征以及训练程序实例的缺乏使得模型很难很好地学习。有几种方法尝试使用专家知识来简化问题，例如仅使用编译器设计者提供的标准级别（例如，-O1、-O2 和 -O3）中的编译器传递或子序列。但是，这些方法忽略了标准级别中未包含的其他有用的编译器传递。主成分分析（PCA）和探索性因子分析（EFA）已被用来减少特征数据​​的冗余。然而，这些无监督方法保留了与编译优化性能无关的所有信息，这可能会误导后续的模型学习。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种编译器通道选择和阶段排序方法，称为基于度量学习和协作过滤的迭代编译（ICMC）。首先，我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法，根据给定程序集上观察到的协作交互和传递之间的依赖关系来构造传递子序列。因此，我们可以利用所有可用的编译器通道并修剪搜索空间。然后，利用监督度量学习方法保留有用的特征信息以进行编译优化，同时删除不相关和冗余信息。基于学习到的相似性度量，采用基于邻域的协同过滤方法来迭代地为每个目标程序推荐一些优秀的编译器通道。最后，设计了迭代数据增强方法来缓解缺乏训练程序实例的问题并增强迭代传递推荐的性能。在所有 32 个 cBench 程序上使用 LLVM 编译器的实验结果表明：（1）ICMC 显着优于几种最先进的编译器相排序方法，（2）它在所有测试程序上的性能与标准级别 -O3 相同或更好，（3）与标准级别 -O3 相比，它可以达到 1.20（最高 1.46）的平均性能加速。

items.title: DynamAP: Architectural Support for Dynamic Graph Traversal on the Automata Processor.
items.abstract: Dynamic graph traversals (DGTs) currently are widely used in many important application domains, especially in this big-data era that urgently demands high-performance graph processing and analysis. Unlike static graph traversals, DGTs in real-world application scenarios require not only fast traversal acceleration itself but also, more importantly, a runtime strategy that can effectively accommodate the ever-evolving nature of the graph structure updates followed by a diverse range of graph traversal algorithms . Because of these special features, state-of-the-art designs on conventional compute-centric architectures (e.g., CPU and GPU) struggle to provide sufficient acceleration for DGT processing due to the dominating irregular memory access patterns in graph traversal algorithms and inefficient platform-specific update mechanisms. In this article, we explore the algorithmic features and runtime requirements of real-world DGTs and identify their unique opportunities of acceleration on the recent Micron Automata Processor (AP), an in-situ memory-centric pattern-matching architecture. These features include the natural mapping between traversal algorithms’ path exploration pattern to classic non-deterministic finite automata processing, AP’s architectural and compilation support for DGTs’ evolving traversal operations, and its inherent hardware fitness. However, despite these benefits, enabling highly efficient DGT execution on AP is non-trivial and faces several major challenges. To tackle them, we propose DynamAP , the first AP framework design that enables fast processing for general DGTs. DynamAP is oblivious to periodical traversal algorithm changes and can address the significant overhead caused by frequent graph updates and AP recompilation through our novel hybrid macro designs and associated efficient updating strategies. We evaluate DynamAP against the current DGT designs on a CPU, GPU, and AP with a range of widely adopted DGT algorithms and real-world graphs. For a single update request , our DynamAP achieves an average speedup of 21.3x (up to 39.2x ) over the state-of-the-art implementation on host-AP architecture; an average speedup of 9.2x (up to 14.7x ) and 1.7x (up to 2.8x ) over two highly optimized DGT design frameworks on a 64-GB Intel(R) Xeon CPU and a 32-GB NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU. DynamAP also maintains high performance and resource utilization for high graph update ratios, and can significantly benefit natural graphs that present a high average vertex degree.
items.abstract_zh: 动态图遍历（DGT）目前广泛应用于许多重要的应用领域，特别是在迫切需要高性能图处理和分析的大数据时代。与静态图遍历不同，实际应用场景中的 DGT 不仅需要快速的遍历加速本身，更重要的是，需要一种能够有效适应图结构更新不断变化的运行时策略，以及随之而来的各种图遍历算法。由于这些特殊功能，传统以计算为中心的架构（例如 CPU 和 GPU）上的最先进设计很难为 DGT 处理提供足够的加速，因为图遍历算法中的不规则内存访问模式占主导地位，并且平台特定的更新机制效率低下。在本文中，我们探讨了现实世界 DGT 的算法特征和运行时要求，并确定了它们在最新的微米自动机处理器 (AP)（一种以内存为中心的原位模式匹配架构）上加速的独特机会。这些功能包括遍历算法的路径探索模式与经典非确定性有限自动机处理之间的自然映射、AP 对 DGT 不断发展的遍历操作的架构和编译支持及其固有的硬件适应性。然而，尽管有这些好处，在 AP 上实现高效的 DGT 执行并非易事，并且面临几个重大挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 DynamAP，这是第一个能够快速处理通用 DGT 的 AP 框架设计。 DynamAP 不会注意到周期性遍历算法的变化，并且可以通过我们新颖的混合宏设计和相关的高效更新策略来解决由于频繁图更新和 AP 重新编译而导致的巨大开销。我们使用一系列广泛采用的 DGT 算法和真实世界图，根据 CPU、GPU 和 AP 上的当前 DGT 设计来评估 DynamAP。对于单个更新请求，我们的 DynamAP 比主机 AP 架构上最先进的实现平均加速 21.3 倍（高达 39.2 倍）；与 64 GB Intel(R) Xeon CPU 和 32 GB NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU 上的两个高度优化的 DGT 设计框架相比，平均加速分别为 9.2 倍（高达 14.7 倍）和 1.7 倍（高达 2.8 倍）。 DynamAP 还可以保持较高的性能和资源利用率以实现高图更新率，并且可以使呈现高平均顶点度的自然图显着受益。

items.title: An FPGA-based Approach to Evaluate Thermal and Resource Management Strategies of Many-core Processors.
items.abstract: The continuous technology scaling of integrated circuits results in increasingly higher power densities and operating temperatures. Hence, modern many-core processors require sophisticated thermal and resource management strategies to mitigate these undesirable side effects. A simulation-based evaluation of these strategies is limited by the accuracy of the underlying processor model and the simulation speed. Therefore, we present, for the first time, an field-programmable gate array (FPGA)-based evaluation approach to test and compare thermal and resource management strategies using the combination of benchmark generation, FPGA-based application-specific integrated circuit (ASIC) emulation, and run-time monitoring. The proposed benchmark generation method enables an evaluation of run-time management strategies for applications with various run-time characteristics. Furthermore, the ASIC emulation platform features a novel distributed temperature emulator design, whose overhead scales linearly with the number of integrated cores, and a novel dynamic voltage frequency scaling emulator design, which precisely models the timing and energy overhead of voltage and frequency transitions. In our evaluations, we demonstrate the proposed approach for a tiled many-core processor with 80 cores on four Virtex-7 FPGAs. Additionally, we present the suitability of the platform to evaluate state-of-the-art run-time management techniques with a case study.
items.abstract_zh: 集成电路的不断技术扩展导致功率密度和工作温度越来越高。因此，现代多核处理器需要复杂的热和资源管理策略来减轻这些不良副作用。这些策略的基于仿真的评估受到底层处理器模型的准确性和仿真速度的限制。因此，我们首次提出一种基于现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的评估方法，结合基准生成、基于 FPGA 的专用集成电路 (ASIC) 仿真和运行时监控来测试和比较热管理和资源管理策略。所提出的基准生成方法能够评估具有各种运行时特征的应用程序的运行时管理策略。此外，ASIC仿真平台还采用新颖的分布式温度仿真器设计（其开销与集成内核的数量成线性比例）和新颖的动态电压频率缩放仿真器设计（可精确模拟电压和频率转换的时序和能量开销）。在我们的评估中，我们演示了针对四个 Virtex-7 FPGA 上具有 80 个内核的平铺众核处理器提出的方法。此外，我们还通过案例研究展示了该平台评估最先进的运行时管理技术的适用性。

items.title: HAIR: Halving the Area of the Integer Register File with Odd/Even Banking.
items.abstract: This article proposes a new microarchitectural scheme for reducing the hardware complexity of the integer register file of a superscalar processor. The register file is split into two banks holding even-numbered and odd-numbered physical registers, respectively. Each bank provides one read port to each two-input integer execution unit. This way, each bank has half the total number of read ports, and the register file area is roughly halved, which reduces the energy dissipated per register access and the register access time. However, a bank conflict occurs when both inputs of a two-input micro-operation lie in the same bank. Bank conflicts hurt performance, and we propose a simple solution to remove most bank conflicts, thus recovering most of the lost performance.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的微架构方案，用于降低超标量处理器的整数寄存器文件的硬件复杂性。寄存器文件分为两个组，分别保存偶数和奇数物理寄存器。每个存储体为每个二输入整数执行单元提供一个读取端口。这样，每个存储体拥有总数一半的读端口，并且寄存器文件区域大致减半，从而减少了每次寄存器访问所消耗的能量和寄存器访问时间。然而，当双输入微操作的两个输入位于同一存储体时，就会发生存储体冲突。银行冲突会损害性能，我们提出了一个简单的解决方案来消除大多数银行冲突，从而恢复大部分损失的性能。

items.title: A Case For Intra-rack Resource Disaggregation in HPC.
items.abstract: The expected halt of traditional technology scaling is motivating increased heterogeneity in high-performance computing (HPC) systems with the emergence of numerous specialized accelerators. As heterogeneity increases, so does the risk of underutilizing expensive hardware resources if we preserve today’s rigid node configuration and reservation strategies. This has sparked interest in resource disaggregation to enable finer-grain allocation of hardware resources to applications. However, there is currently no data-driven study of what range of disaggregation is appropriate in HPC. To that end, we perform a detailed analysis of key metrics sampled in NERSC’s Cori, a production HPC system that executes a diverse open-science HPC workload. In addition, we profile a variety of deep-learning applications to represent an emerging workload. We show that for a rack (cabinet) configuration and applications similar to Cori, a central processing unit with intra-rack disaggregation has a 99.5% probability to find all resources it requires inside its rack. In addition, ideal intra-rack resource disaggregation in Cori could reduce memory and NIC resources by 5.36% to 69.01% and still satisfy the worst-case average rack utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 随着众多专用加速器的出现，传统技术扩展的预期停止正在推动高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的异构性增加。随着异构性的增加，如果我们保留当今严格的节点配置和预留策略，那么未充分利用昂贵的硬件资源的风险也会增加。这引发了人们对资源分解的兴趣，以实现更细粒度的硬件资源分配给应用程序。然而，目前还没有关于 HPC 中合适的分解范围的数据驱动研究。为此，我们对 NERSC 的 Cori 中采样的关键指标进行了详细分析，Cori 是一个执行各种开放科学 HPC 工作负载的生产 HPC 系统。此外，我们还分析了各种深度学习应用程序来代表新兴的工作负载。我们表明，对于类似于 Cori 的机架（机柜）配置和应用程序，具有机架内分解功能的中央处理单元有 99.5% 的概率在其机架内找到所需的所有资源。此外，Cori中理想的机架内资源分解可以将内存和NIC资源减少5.36％至69.01％，并且仍然满足最坏情况下的平均机架利用率。

items.title: Performance and Power Prediction for Concurrent Execution on GPUs.
items.abstract: The unprecedented growth of edge computing and 5G has led to an increased offloading of mobile applications to cloud servers or edge cloudlets. 1 The most prominent workloads comprise computer vision applications. Conventional wisdom suggests that computer vision workloads perform significantly well on SIMD/SIMT architectures such as GPUs owing to the dominance of linear algebra kernels in their composition. In this work, we debunk this popular belief by performing a lot of experiments with the concurrent execution of these workloads, which is the most popular pattern in which these workloads are executed on cloud servers. We show that the performance of these applications on GPUs does not scale well with an increase in the number of concurrent applications primarily because of contention at the shared resources and lack of efficient virtualization techniques for GPUs. Hence, there is a need to accurately predict the performance and power of such ensemble workloads on a GPU. Sadly, most of the prior work in the area of performance/power prediction is for only a single application. To the best of our knowledge, we propose the first machine learning-based predictor to predict the performance and power of an ensemble of applications on a GPU. In this article, we show that by using the execution statistics of stand-alone workloads and the fairness of execution when these workloads are executed with three representative microbenchmarks, we can get a reasonably accurate prediction. This is the first such work in the direction of performance and power prediction for concurrent applications that does not rely on the features extracted from concurrent executions or GPU profiling data. Our predictors achieve an accuracy of 91% and 96% in estimating the performance and power of executing two applications concurrently, respectively. We also demonstrate a method to extend our models to four or five concurrently running applications on modern GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘计算和 5G 的空前增长导致移动应用程序向云服务器或边缘云的卸载量增加。 1 最突出的工作负载包括计算机视觉应用程序。传统观点认为，由于线性代数内核在其构成中占主导地位，计算机视觉工作负载在 GPU 等 SIMD/SIMT 架构上表现出色。在这项工作中，我们通过对这些工作负载的并发执行进行大量实验来揭穿这种流行的看法，这是这些工作负载在云服务器上执行的最流行的模式。我们表明，这些应用程序在 GPU 上的性能并不能随着并发应用程序数量的增加而很好地扩展，这主要是因为共享资源的争用以及缺乏有效的 GPU 虚拟化技术。因此，需要准确预测 GPU 上此类集成工作负载的性能和功率。遗憾的是，性能/功耗预测领域的大多数先前工作仅适用于单个应用。据我们所知，我们提出了第一个基于机器学习的预测器来预测 GPU 上应用程序集合的性能和功率。在本文中，我们表明，通过使用独立工作负载的执行统计数据以及使用三个代表性微基准执行这些工作负载时的执行公平性，我们可以获得相当准确的预测。这是针对并发应用程序的性能和功率预测方向的第一个此类工作，不依赖于从并发执行或 GPU 分析数据中提取的特征。我们的预测器在估计同时执行两个应用程序的性能和功率方面分别达到了 91% 和 96% 的准确度。我们还演示了一种将我们的模型扩展到现代 GPU 上同时运行的四到五个应用程序的方法。

items.title: Object Intersection Captures on Interactive Apps to Drive a Crowd-sourced Replay-based Compiler Optimization.
items.abstract: Traditional offline optimization frameworks rely on representative hardware, software, and inputs to compare different optimizations on. With application-specific optimization for mobile systems though, the idea of a representative testbench is unrealistic while creating offline inputs is non-trivial. Online approaches partially overcome these problems but they might expose users to suboptimal or even erroneous code. Therefore, our mobile code is poorly optimized, resulting in wasted performance and energy and user frustration. In this article, we introduce a novel compiler optimization approach designed for mobile applications. It requires no developer effort, it tunes applications for the user’s device and usage patterns, and it has no negative impact on the user experience. It is based on a lightweight capture and replay mechanism. Our previous work [ 46 ] captures the state accessed by any targeted code region during its online stage. By repurposing existing OS capabilities, it keeps the overhead low. In its offline stage, it replays the code region but under different optimization decisions to enable sound comparisons of different optimizations under realistic conditions. In this article, we propose a technique that further decreases the storage sizes without any additional overhead. It captures only the intersection of reachable objects and accessed heap pages. We compare this with another new approach that has minimal runtime overheads at the cost of higher capture sizes. Coupled with a search heuristic for the compiler optimization space, our capture and replay mechanism allows us to discover optimization decisions that improve performance without testing these decisions directly on the user. Finally, with crowd-sourcing we split this offline evaluation effort between several users, allowing us to discover better code in less time. We implemented a prototype system in Android based on LLVM combined with a genetic search engine and a crowd-sourcing architecture. We evaluated it on both benchmarks and real Android applications. Online captures are infrequent and introduce ~5 ms or 15 ms on average, depending on the approach used. For this negligible effect on user experience, we achieve speedups of 44% on average over the Android compiler and 35% over LLVM -O3. Our collaborative search is just 5% short of that speedup, which is impressive given the acceleration gains. The user with the highest workload concluded the search 7 \( \times \) faster.
items.abstract_zh: 传统的离线优化框架依赖于代表性的硬件、软件和输入来比较不同的优化。然而，通过针对移动系统的特定于应用程序的优化，具有代表性的测试平台的想法是不现实的，而创建离线输入也并非易事。在线方法部分克服了这些问题，但它们可能会让用户接触到次优甚至错误的代码。因此，我们的移动代码优化不佳，导致性能和精力的浪费以及用户的挫败感。在本文中，我们介绍了一种专为移动应用程序设计的新颖的编译器优化方法。它不需要开发人员付出任何努力，它可以根据用户的设备和使用模式调整应用程序，并且不会对用户体验产生负面影响。它基于轻量级捕获和重放机制。我们之前的工作 [46] 捕获任何目标代码区域在其在线阶段访问的状态。通过重新利用现有操作系统功能，可以保持较低的开销。在离线阶段，它会在不同的优化决策下重播代码区域，以便在实际条件下对不同优化进行合理的比较。在本文中，我们提出了一种技术，可以进一步减小存储大小，而无需任何额外的开销。它仅捕获可访问对象和访问的堆页面的交集。我们将此与另一种新方法进行比较，该方法具有最小的运行时开销，但代价是更高的捕获大小。与编译器优化空间的搜索启发式相结合，我们的捕获和重放机制使我们能够发现可提高性能的优化决策，而无需直接在用户上测试这些决策。最后，通过众包，我们将离线评估工作分配给多个用户，使我们能够在更短的时间内发现更好的代码。我们在 Android 中实现了一个基于 LLVM 并结合遗传搜索引擎和众包架构的原型系统。我们在基准测试和真实的 Android 应用程序上对其进行了评估。在线捕获并不频繁，平均需要大约 5 毫秒或 15 毫秒，具体取决于所使用的方法。由于这种对用户体验的影响可以忽略不计，我们比 Android 编译器平均加速了 44%，比 LLVM -O3 平均加速了 35%。我们的协作搜索仅比该加速少 5%，考虑到加速增益，这是令人印象深刻的。工作负载最高的用户完成搜索的速度快 7 倍。

items.title: Architecting Optically Controlled Phase Change Memory.
items.abstract: Phase Change Memory (PCM) is an attractive candidate for main memory, as it offers non-volatility and zero leakage power while providing higher cell densities, longer data retention time, and higher capacity scaling compared to DRAM. In PCM, data is stored in the crystalline or amorphous state of the phase change material. The typical electrically controlled PCM (EPCM), however, suffers from longer write latency and higher write energy compared to DRAM and limited multi-level cell (MLC) capacities. These challenges limit the performance of data-intensive applications running on computing systems with EPCMs. Recently, researchers demonstrated optically controlled PCM (OPCM) cells with support for 5 bits / cell in contrast to 2 bits / cell in EPCM. These OPCM cells can be accessed directly with optical signals that are multiplexed in high-bandwidth-density silicon-photonic links. The higher MLC capacity in OPCM and the direct cell access using optical signals enable an increased read/write throughput and lower energy per access than EPCM. However, due to the direct cell access using optical signals, OPCM systems cannot be designed using conventional memory architecture. We need a complete redesign of the memory architecture that is tailored to the properties of OPCM technology. This article presents the design of a unified network and main memory system called COSMOS that combines OPCM and silicon-photonic links to achieve high memory throughput. COSMOS is composed of a hierarchical multi-banked OPCM array with novel read and write access protocols. COSMOS uses an Electrical-Optical-Electrical (E-O-E) control unit to map standard DRAM read/write commands (sent in electrical domain) from the memory controller on to optical signals that access the OPCM cells. Our evaluation of a 2.5D-integrated system containing a processor and COSMOS demonstrates 2.14 × average speedup across graph and HPC workloads compared to an EPCM system. COSMOS consumes 3.8× lower read energy-per-bit and 5.97× lower write energy-per-bit compared to EPCM. COSMOS is the first non-volatile memory that provides comparable performance and energy consumption as DDR5 in addition to increased bit density, higher area efficiency, and improved scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 相变存储器 (PCM) 是主存储器的一个有吸引力的候选者，因为与 DRAM 相比，它提供非易失性和零泄漏功率，同时提供更高的单元密度、更长的数据保留时间和更高的容量扩展。在PCM中，数据以相变材料的晶态或非晶态存储。然而，与 DRAM 相比，典型的电控 PCM (EPCM) 存在更长的写入延迟和更高的写入能量，并且多层单元 (MLC) 容量有限。这些挑战限制了在具有 EPCM 的计算系统上运行的数据密集型应用程序的性能。最近，研究人员展示了支持 5 位/单元的光控 PCM (OPCM) 单元，而 EPCM 中支持 2 位/单元。这些 OPCM 单元可以直接通过在高带宽密度硅光子链路中复用的光信号进行访问。 OPCM 中更高的 MLC 容量以及使用光信号的直接单元访问可实现比 EPCM 更高的读/写吞吐量和更低的每次访问能量。然而，由于使用光信号的直接单元访问，OPCM系统不能使用传统的存储器架构来设计。我们需要对内存架构进行彻底的重新设计，以适应 OPCM 技术的特性。本文介绍了名为 COSMOS 的统一网络和主存储器系统的设计，该系统结合了 OPCM 和硅光子链路以实现高存储器吞吐量。 COSMOS 由具有新颖读写访问协议的分层多组 OPCM 阵列组成。 COSMOS 使用电光电 (E-O-E) 控制单元将标准 DRAM 读/写命令（在电域中发送）从内存控制器映射到访问 OPCM 单元的光信号。我们对包含处理器和 COSMOS 的 2.5D 集成系统的评估表明，与 EPCM 系统相比，图形和 HPC 工作负载的平均加速速度为 2.14 倍。与 EPCM 相比，COSMOS 的每比特读取能量降低了 3.8 倍，每比特写入能量降低了 5.97 倍。 COSMOS 是首款非易失性存储器，除了增加的位密度、更高的面积效率和改进的可扩展性之外，还提供与 DDR5 相当的性能和能耗。

items.title: Cooperative Slack Management: Saving Energy of Multicore Processors by Trading Performance Slack Between QoS-Constrained Applications.
items.abstract: Processor resources can be adapted at runtime according to the dynamic behavior of applications to reduce the energy consumption of multicore processors without affecting the Quality-of-Service (QoS). To achieve this, an online resource management scheme is needed to control processor configurations such as cache partitioning, dynamic voltage-frequency scaling, and dynamic adaptation of core resources. Prior State-of-the-art has shown the potential for reducing energy without any performance degradation by coordinating the control of different resources. However, in this article, we show that by allowing short-term variations in processing speed (e.g., instructions per second rate), in a controlled fashion, we can enable substantial improvements in energy savings while maintaining QoS. We keep track of such variations in the form of performance slack. Slack can be generated, at some energy cost, by processing faster than the performance target.
